prompt: Create a detailed, high-quality vertical sports broadcast photograph of FC Barcelona fans packed tightly in a stadium crowd during a match. Center the image on a young blonde woman and a young dark-haired bearded man posing together in the stands, both wearing the club’s blue-and-claret striped home jerseys with the crest, yellow Nike swoosh, and Spotify sponsor. The man stands slightly behind and to the right with his arm around the woman’s shoulders; the woman leans into him with one arm across his waist, wearing a delicate necklace and flower-shaped earrings. Surround them with other supporters in the same jerseys, including one fan at left raising an arm, one fan at right holding a clear plastic cup of beer, and a partially visible fan cap at bottom left with a yellow band reading “FCBARCELONA.” Use a realistic telephoto stadium-crowd composition, shallow depth of field, natural arena lighting, saturated club colors, and documentary sports-photo detail. Add broadcast graphics: a green scoreboard overlay in the top left showing UEFA Champions League styling, “BAR 2 - 1” and “MANCHESTER CITY,” a white Korean-style TV network bug in the top right, and a white “TUDN EN VIVO” watermark at the bottom left. Include exactly four rectangular blurred face/privacy blocks: one large block over the central man’s face, one medium block over the central woman’s face, one tall block over the raised-arm fan’s face in the upper left-center, and one medium block over the fan’s face in the upper right. Do not add extra people in the foreground, do not change the central couple’s pose, and keep all visible branding consistent with FC Barcelona.
